## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Prophecy's repositioning strategy and align GrowthX content efforts with new focus on business analysts and data integration.](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prophecy is shifting focus from data engineers to business analysts/data teams, emphasizing self-service data prep with governance](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=98.0)
  - [New positioning: "Data integration platform enabling governed self-service data prep for everyone"](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [Content strategy needs to evolve to target business analysts, highlight speed/ease of use, while maintaining enterprise governance angle](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [GrowthX team to research business analyst persona, pain points, and adjust content topics/angles over next 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)

## Topics

### Market Changes Driving Repositioning

  - [AI commodifying coding capabilities, squeezing Prophecy from top (analytics platforms) and bottom (cloud data platforms)](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [Previous positioning lacked urgency; reliable data access is the real problem (revenue-side vs. cost center)](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [Shift to "code-adjacent" approach: AI + visual interface + code, making data more accessible for everyone](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)

### New Positioning Details

  - [From: Data transformation co-pilot for data engineers](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)
  - [To: Data integration platform enabling governed self-service data prep for everyone](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [Pain points: High costs/risks of traditional self-service tools vs. Prophecy's governed, efficient approach](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [Personas: Data team leaders (central/LOB), business leaders, analysts (vs. previous focus on data engineering)](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)

### Product Demo Highlights

  - [AI-assisted pipeline creation using natural language](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=2980.0)
  - [Visual pipeline building with governed data sources](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=2993.0)
  - [Easy data profiling, reporting, and sharing capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=3052.0)
  - [Maintains enterprise-grade governance and code quality](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=3096.0)

### Content Strategy Implications

  - [Research business analyst persona: pain points, objections, terminology](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - [Adjust existing topics to emphasize speed, ease of use, reduced IT dependence](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Explore new areas: visual pipeline tools, faster insights, building trust in reports](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Maintain some ETL/data engineering content for architects/technical audience](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=1647.0)
  - [Expand competitive research beyond traditional ETL tools](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to spend 1-2 weeks researching business analyst persona and adjusting content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=1898.0)
  - Prophecy team to provide:
      - [Sales call transcripts/notes highlighting customer pain points (anonymized if needed)](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=3446.0)
      - [Additional internal resources on positioning, pain points, objections](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=3654.0)
  - [Ongoing collaboration via Slack for quick questions/approvals on new topic ideas](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=3906.0)
  - [Review progress in next week's regular meeting](https://fathom.video/share/uxXL2uhTgyay-_NBcPgypsKZ_KPQXYAC?tab=summary&timestamp=3934.0)
